contract.question_order: Preserve the source workflow order; gather prerequisites before consequential questions.
contract.pressure: Preserve the source forcing questions, recommendation pressure, and one-question-at-a-time cadence.
contract.smart_skips: Skip only when the source condition is false, and name every skipped module with evidence.
contract.stop_approval_gates: Preserve every STOP, hard gate, approval boundary, and no-mutation-before-approval rule.
contract.evidence: Ground conclusions in inspected code, commands, browser/device observations, or source artifacts.
contract.artifacts: Produce every report, plan, log, screenshot, manifest, or handoff required by the source.
contract.mutation: Use the source mutation boundary; never broaden writes, commits, pushes, merges, or deploys.
contract.exit: Preserve source completion checks, unresolved-decision reporting, and explicit blocked exits.
contract.voice: Direct builder voice; match the user language and retain source-specific tone constraints.
